ddls:
CREATE TABLE "dbms" (
  "dbms_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each DBMS */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the DBMS (e.g., Oracle, MySQL) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the DBMS */,
  "initial_release" TEXT /* Initial release date of the DBMS */,
  "current_release" TEXT /* Current release of the DBMS */,
  "license" TEXT /* License type of the DBMS (e.g., open source, commercial) */,
  "license_info" TEXT /* Detailed information about the DBMS license */,
  "cloud_based_only" INTEGER /* Whether the DBMS is cloud-based only */,
  "dbms_model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the DBMS model */,
  "documentation_url" TEXT /* URL to detailed documentation (release notes, license agreements) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update timestamp for the DBMS record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dbms_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dbms_dbms_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("dbms_model_id") REFERENCES dbms_models ("dbms_model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dbms_models" (
  "dbms_model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each DBMS model */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the DBMS model (e.g., relational, document) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the DBMS model */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the model is currently active */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update timestamp for the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dbms_model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dbms_releases" (
  "dbms_release_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each DBMS release */,
  "dbms_id" INTEGER /* ID of the DBMS the release belongs to */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the DBMS */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the DBMS release */,
  "version" TEXT /* Specific version number of the release */,
  "changelog" TEXT /* Detailed changelog for the release */,
  "is_major_release" INTEGER /* Indicates if the release is a major version */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update timestamp for the release */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dbms_release_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dbms_releases_dbms_id FOREIGN KEY ("dbms_id") REFERENCES dbms ("dbms_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dbms_rankings" (
  "dbms_ranking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each DBMS ranking */,
  "dbms_id" INTEGER /* ID of the DBMS the ranking belongs to */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Market ranking of the DBMS */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the ranking was recorded */,
  "quarter" TEXT /* Quarter of the year the ranking was recorded */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the ranking data */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update timestamp for the ranking */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dbms_ranking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dbms_rankings_dbms_id FOREIGN KEY ("dbms_id") REFERENCES dbms ("dbms_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's team */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login timestamp for the user */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the team */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update timestamp for the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update timestamp for the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update timestamp for the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_role_mappings" (
  "user_role_mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-role mapping */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update timestamp for the user-role mapping */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_mappings_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_mappings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "role_permission_mappings" (
  "role_permission_mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role-permission mapping */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the permission */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update timestamp for the role-permission mapping */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_permission_mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_role_permission_mappings_permission_id FOREIGN KEY ("permission_id") REFERENCES user_permissions ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_role_permission_mappings_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)
